const plan = [
  { day: 1, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-01.mp4', tags: ['nature','forest','morning'] },
  { day: 2, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-02.mp4', tags: ['ocean','sunset','calm'] },
  { day: 3, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-03.mp4', tags: ['rain','city','night'] },
  { day: 4, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-04.mp4', tags: ['mountains','clouds','ambient'] },
  { day: 5, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-05.mp4', tags: ['surf','beach','golden hour'] },
  { day: 6, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-06.mp4', tags: ['river','green','chill'] },
  { day: 7, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-07.mp4', tags: ['sea','waves','focus'] },
  { day: 8, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-08.mp4', tags: ['forest','rain','calm'] },
  { day: 9, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-09.mp4', tags: ['sunrise','mountain','study'] },
  { day: 10, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-10.mp4', tags: ['ocean','drone','ambient'] },
  { day: 11, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-11.mp4', tags: ['jungle','mist','deep'] },
  { day: 12, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-12.mp4', tags: ['city','night','lights'] },
  { day: 13, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-13.mp4', tags: ['waterfall','nature','relax'] },
  { day: 14, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-14.mp4', tags: ['beach','sun','chill'] },
  { day: 15, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-15.mp4', tags: ['forest','path','focus'] },
  { day: 16, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-16.mp4', tags: ['surf','ocean','calm'] },
  { day: 17, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-17.mp4', tags: ['snow','mountain','ambient'] },
  { day: 18, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-18.mp4', tags: ['rain','window','sleep'] },
  { day: 19, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-19.mp4', tags: ['lake','sunset','meditation'] },
  { day: 20, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-20.mp4', tags: ['island','sea','vibes'] },
  { day: 21, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-21.mp4', tags: ['forest','wind','deep work'] },
  { day: 22, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-22.mp4', tags: ['ocean','moonlight','night'] },
  { day: 23, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-23.mp4', tags: ['city','rain','late night'] },
  { day: 24, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-24.mp4', tags: ['mountain','sunset','focus'] },
  { day: 25, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-25.mp4', tags: ['sea','rocks','calm'] },
  { day: 26, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-26.mp4', tags: ['river','autumn','study'] },
  { day: 27, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-27.mp4', tags: ['forest','night','sleep'] },
  { day: 28, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-28.mp4', tags: ['beach','dawn','ambient'] },
  { day: 29, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-29.mp4', tags: ['ocean','storm','dark'] },
  { day: 30, source_video_path: '/storage/videos/day-30.mp4', tags: ['nature','mixed','lofi'] }
];

const dayIndex = (new Date().getUTCDate() - 1) % plan.length;
const item = plan[dayIndex];

return [{
  json: {
    source_video_path: item.source_video_path,
    tags: item.tags,
    publish_at_iso: new Date().toISOString(),
    shorts_count: 3,
    short_delay_hours: 1,
    short_interval_hours: 7,
    clip_seconds: 30
  }
}];
